countries.Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da C: Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha

pre_quraan.level_0: New to Arabic letters, sounds, or harakat.
pre_quraan.level_1: Can recognize, pronounce, and write the Arabic alphabet.
pre_quraan.level_2: Can write 2 joined letters, 3 joined letters, 4 joined letters, and 5 joined letters.
pre_quraan.level_3: Tajweed level - Beginner, Middle, or Advanced.
pre_quraan.level_4: Can read simple Arabic words and is preparing to read the Quran fluently.

tarbiyah_kids.level 1: Needs basic Islamic manners, habits, stories, and daily routines.
tarbiyah_kids.level 2: Understands simple values and can discuss guided stories or examples.
tarbiyah_kids.level 3: Can reflect on manners, choices, and Islamic values with more independence.

essential_arabic.level 1: Beginning Arabic letters, sounds, basic words, and simple writing.
essential_arabic.level 2: Can read and write simple words and is building vocabulary and sentences.
essential_arabic.level 3: Can read short passages and is developing comprehension and expression.

quran_reading.level 1: Can read short Arabic or Quran words with support.
quran_reading.level 2: Can read short passages but needs fluency, correction, and confidence.
quran_reading.level 3: Reads longer passages and needs tajweed, pace, and consistency support.

quran_tafsir.level 1: Ready for simple meanings, vocabulary, stories, and guided reflection.
quran_tafsir.level 2: Can discuss short surahs or themes with teacher guidance.
quran_tafsir.level 3: Can connect meanings, lessons, and reflections across longer passages.

quraan_memorization.level 1: Starting short surahs or needs a first memorization routine.
quraan_memorization.level 2: Has memorized some surahs and needs revision structure and listening.
quraan_memorization.level 3: Has ongoing memorization and needs stronger retention, review, and targets.
